title: HELP Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004
display_title: HELP Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004
wikitext:
[]: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by TomsonPRD » Tue May 05, 2020 7:32 am I've spent almost an entire week searching in vain, so if anyone here has any info, I would like to know the location of this Studio https://www.flickr.com/photos/microbry/albums/72157621135856555 that Gainax occupied from circa 1994 to 2004, when they moved to another location https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q834328#/media/File:Studio_GAINAX.jpg which is supposedly here https://goo.gl/maps/ghvYi5kXzwoM5rHC8 The building I'm looking for is the same where we can see the graffitis of EoE https://wiki.evageeks.org/File:Eoe_death_threats3.jpg , and I know it wasn't demolished until 2011, as we can see here https://www.evageeks.org/2011/10/gainax-graffiti/ In fact, all previous buildings, including the one they used from 2005 to 2013, don't exist anymore https://goo.gl/maps/zam11syvK5qh18FL8 , so if you know the address of the first one, it would be so damn awesome!

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Velorex » Sat May 09, 2020 2:25 am https://matome.naver.jp/odai/2131848707843722501 May I ask why do you want to know about the building? https://twitter.com/ritsuro/status/1055163543287291904 I just found this tweet when searching with a Jp vpn/terms SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Velorex » Sat May 09, 2020 4:58 am Wait im an idiot, one of the pics had the name of the area... so that limits the locations to Musashino City Nakacho https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nakacho,+Musashino,+Tokyo+180-0006/@35.7064107,139.5631223,16z/data=!4m5!3m4!1s0x6018efadc918df9b:0xe94f50309b9f71be!8m2!3d35.7070888!4d139.564920 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by TomsonPRD » Sat May 09, 2020 5:31 pm Veroex, you are an actual God. I honestly can't thank you enough for finding all these infos for me, going out of your way trying to help. Seriously, wow, you've found everything I needed, this is so damn great. The only thing I desired to know was the actual address, since I'm going to Japan in September (hoping flights will start again by that time), and desperately wanted to see at least the location where Anno and Gainax made their magnum opus. I already knew the previous building could have been demolished, so I was just wishing for the coordinates: but the unexpected front pic from twitter too, wow, that's just a perfect plus. Again, many thanks for answering and taking the time to write all this, seems like the quest has come to an end with you.

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Velorex » Sat May 09, 2020 7:05 pm Glad to help; btw a nice little Ramen place is 3 buildings down. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by TomsonPRD » Sun May 10, 2020 5:17 am Wow! This'll be a perfect spot to eat after seeing all the Anime Studios on the Chuo line! Thanks again!

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Zoop » Tue May 12, 2020 3:18 am Velorex wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by robersora » Tue May 12, 2020 9:58 am ^ you know what, that could very well be. Interesting observation!

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed May 13, 2020 6:56 am Ramiel always shared a shape with Nadia's pendant in The Secret of Blue Water . If Gainiax and that building were there since the late 80's, then it could be responsible for influencing the designs of a couple of great shows.

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun May 17, 2020 9:30 pm the building was demolished before 2009, and most Japanese buildings only last 30 years due to being made out of wood. The building was probably built during the mid 70's

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Zoop » Fri May 22, 2020 5:03 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Ramiel always shared a shape with Nadia's pendant in The Secret of Blue Water . If Gainiax and that building were there since the late 80's, then it could be responsible for influencing the designs of a couple of great shows.

[]: Re: HELP! Address of Gainax Headquarters before 2004             Quote Post by Velorex » Tue May 26, 2020 2:01 pm It might be worth looking around the area on google maps; perhaps some locations seen in EOE can be found nearby. The furthest back I saw for the area is 2009...
